subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! When the Sun of Truth dawned from the horizon of sanctification, the power of attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات القدس چون شمس حقیقت از افق تقدیس طلوع فرمود قوه جاذبه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
